name: Juice Shop — NoSQL injection via $where in track-order lookup

provenance.note: Vulnerable side is verbatim-real Juice Shop master; safe baseline reconstructed (Juice Shop ships no in-repo fix). Challenge: NoSQL DoS.

notes: req.params.id (only truncated via utils.trunc) is interpolated into a MongoDB $where clause, which executes server-side JavaScript — enabling NoSQL injection / DoS. Fix sanitises id and uses a structured { orderId: id } query.
